==Pokémon==
[[File:Lana and her Pokémon.png|thumb|250px|Lana's current [[party]]]]
Like {{an|Misty}}, Lana mostly specializes in {{type|Water}} Pokémon.

At first, Lana didn't have a lot of battling experience. However, Lana showed improvement and became the most experienced battler out of the girls in {{an|Professor Kukui}}'s class, even having her {{TP|Lana|Primarina}} learn an {{type|Ice}} move to use on an opponent that had the advantage over Water types, as seen in ''[[SM130|Battling Besties!]]''. Her Primarina is seemingly her strongest Pokémon in battle, and her only Pokémon who has been seen using [[Z-Move]]s.

This listing is of Lana's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

===At home===
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lana
|pkmn=Lapras
|type1=Water
|type2=Ice
|img=Lana Lapras.png
|cap=
|epnum=SM001
|epname=Alola to New Adventure!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc=This {{p|Lapras}} serves as Lana's Ride Pokémon. It was first seen in ''[[SM001|Alola to New Adventure!]]'', where Lana rode on it while fishing. In ''[[SM005|Yo, Ho, Ho! Go, Popplio!]]'', it was seen in flashback being used to battle against some {{tc|Team Skull Grunt}}s that were bullying a wild {{p|Popplio}}. When not in use, it resides in the water next to Lana's house.

Lapras was used again in ''[[SM026|So Long, Sophocles!]]'' where Lana took {{an|Sophocles}} and {{TP|Sophocles|Togedemaru}} out to sea so that they could see a {{p|Wailord}} breaching out of the water.

It briefly appeared in the [[Poké Problem]] segment of [[SM079]], residing in the water next to Lana's house as [[Lana's mother]] and [[Harper and Sarah|sisters]] were watching the {{p|Minior}} shower.

In ''[[JN037|That New Old Gang of Mine!]]'', Lana was seen riding on Lapras after she saved [[Goh]] from drowning.

Lapras's only known move is {{m|Ice Beam}}.}}

Stoutland's known moves are {{m|Tackle}} and {{m|Giga Impact}}.}}

|desc=In ''[[SM030|The Ol' Raise and Switch!]]'', {{an|Professor Kukui}} tasked everyone with switching their partner Pokémon with somebody else, and Lana was given {{p|Turtonator}}.

Turtonator found himself the playmate of [[Harper and Sarah]], who played by jumping on his back, which caused them to be hit by {{m|Shell Trap}}.

The next day, Lana scrubbed Turtonator's back with help from Harper and Sarah.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wild
|pkmn=Dewpider
|type1=Water
|type2=Bug
|img=Dewpider anime.png
|epnum=SM071
|epname=Dewpider Ascending!
|vajp=Toru Sakurai
|vaen=Martha Harms
|desc=Lana encountered {{p|Dewpider}} when its bubble popped. Dewpider developed a crush on Lana after seeing a bubble on her head. Having been told by its parent {{p|Araquanid}} to go out to find a new home and getting separated from the rest of its group, Dewpider found itself a home.

Dewpider's moves are {{m|Bubble}}, {{m|Bubble Beam}}, {{m|Spider Web}}, and {{m|Mirror Coat}}.}}
